channel.title: HTTP & middleware on Pionia
channel.description: Recent content in HTTP & middleware on Pionia

item.title: Welcome page and branding
item.description: Name your app with APP_NAME; framework welcome at / until you ship public/index.html.

item.title: Collections (Arrayable)
item.description: Typed getters, merging, chain helpers, and the full Arrayable API on Moonlight payloads.

item.title: HTTP routing
item.description: How switches register routes and how the kernel dispatches HTTP requests.

item.title: Middleware
item.description: Global middleware runs before dispatch and after the response is built.

item.title: Requests and Responses
item.description: Moonlight actions receive Arrayable request data and return ApiResponse envelopes.

item.title: Exceptions & error handling
item.description: Centralized reporting and rendering for all uncaught throwables.
